title: Docsbook Widget Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema for the YAML frontmatter of a WIDGET.md file in the docs-widgets catalog.

description.description: Short human-readable description used for LLM matching and MCP tool description. Should include when the LLM should use this widget.

modes.description: Which chat contexts show this widget. 'user' = end-user documentation chat; 'admin' = Docsbook admin chat.

triggers.description: Keyword phrases the LLM matches to decide when to activate this widget. These become part of the MCP tool description.

mcp_resource_uri.description: The ui:// URI stem for this widget's MCP resource. E.g. 'ui://openapi-renderer/render'.

requires_plan.description: Minimum Docsbook plan required to use this widget.

keywords.description: Discovery keywords used by find_widget scoring.

discriminators.description: Exact high-precision phrases for widget matching (e.g. proper nouns, spec names).

built_in.description: True for official Docsbook widgets; false for community widgets.

repository.description: URL of the widget's source repository.

homepage.description: URL of the widget's documentation or homepage.
